2604.27586.title: Trace-Level Analysis of Information Contamination in Multi-Agent Systems
2604.27586.paper_summary: Reasoning over heterogeneous artifacts (PDFs, spreadsheets, slide decks, etc.) increasingly occurs within structured agent workflows that iteratively extract, transform, and reference external information. In these workflows, uncertainty is not merely an input-quality issue: it can redirect decomposition and routing decisions, reshape intermediate state, and produce qualitatively different execution trajectories. We study this phenomenon by treating uncertainty as a controlled variable: we inject structured perturbations into artifact-derived representations, execute fixed workflows under comprehensive logging, and quantify contamination via trace divergence in plans, tool invocations, and intermediate state. Across 614 paired runs on 32 GAIA tasks with three different language models, we find a decoupling: workflows may diverge substantially yet recover correct answers, or remain structurally similar while producing incorrect outputs. We characterize three manifestation types: silent semantic corruption, behavioral detours with recovery, and combined structural disruption and their control-flow signatures (rerouting, extended execution, early termination). We measure operational costs and characterize why commonly used verification guardrails fail to intercept contamination. We contribute (i) a formal taxonomy of contamination manifestations in structured workflows, (ii) a trace-based measurement framework for detecting and localizing contamination across agent interactions, and (iii) empirical evidence with implications for targeted verification, defensive design, and cost control.
2604.27586.paper_summary_zh: 在異質工件（PDF、電子表格、簡報等）上進行推理越來越多地發生在結構化代理工作流程中，這些工作流程迭代地提取、轉換並引用外部信息。在這些工作流程中，不確定性不僅僅是輸入質量問題：它可以重新引導分解和路由決策，重塑中間狀態，並產生質量上不同的執行軌跡。我們通過將不確定性視為一個可控變量來研究這一現象：我們將結構化擾動注入工件衍生的表示中，在全面記錄下執行固定工作流程，並通過計劃、工具調用和中間狀態的痕跡偏差來量化污染。在對32個GAIA任務進行614次配對運行，使用三種不同的語言模型時，我們發現了一種解耦現象：工作流程可能大幅度偏離卻仍能恢復正確答案，或者在產生不正確輸出時保持結構相似。我們對三種表現類型進行了描述：靜默語義腐敗、帶有恢復的行為繞道，以及結構性破壞的組合及其控制流特徵（重新路由、延長執行、提前終止）。我們測量了操作成本並描述了為何常用的驗證防護措施未能攔截污染。我們貢獻了（i）一個結構化工作流程中污染表現的正式分類法，（ii）一個基於痕跡的測量框架，用於檢測和定位代理交互中的污染，以及（iii）具有針對性驗證、防禦設計和成本控制影響的實證證據。
2604.27586.author: Anna Mazhar et.al.
2604.27586.authors: Anna Mazhar, Huzaifa Suri, Sainyam Galhotra
